description_for_human: ReadGZH — Let AI read full-text WeChat Official Account articles, extracting title, author, and content
description_for_model: Use ReadGZH to read and extract the full text content of WeChat Official Account (微信公众号) articles. Given a WeChat article URL (mp.weixin.qq.com), it returns the article title, author, publish time, and full text content in clean format. Useful when users share WeChat article links and want AI to read, summarize, or analyze the content. More info at https://readgzh.site/docs
